mapper.select: SELECT ws.id AS sessionId, ws.session_no AS orderNo, ws.check_in_time AS appointTime, CASE ws.status WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 5 WHEN 2 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END AS status, ws.total_amount AS payAmount, 0 AS techIncome, COALESCE(ws.member_name, '') AS memberNickname, NULL AS memberAvatar FROM cb_walkin_session ws WHERE ws.technician_id = #{techId} AND ws.deleted = 0 AND ws.status NOT IN (3, 4) AND FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() ORDER BY ws.check_in_time ASC

SELECT ws.id AS sessionId, ws.session_no AS orderNo, ws.check_in_time AS appointTime, ws.check_in_time AS createTime, CASE ws.status WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 5 WHEN 2 THEN 5 WHEN 3 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END AS mappedStatus, ws.status AS rawStatus, ws.total_amount AS payAmount, COALESCE(ws.member_name, '') AS memberNickname, COALESCE(ws.member_mobile, '') AS memberMobile, ws.wristband_no AS wristbandNo, ws.remark AS remark, ws.service_start_time AS startTime FROM cb_walkin_session ws WHERE ws.technician_id = #{techId} AND ws.deleted = 0 AND ws.check_in_time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY))
AND CASE ws.status WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 5 WHEN 2 THEN 5 WHEN 3 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END IN
#{s}
ORDER BY ws.check_in_time DESC LIMIT 200
